name: Dental & Oral Health
credibility_policy: Every medical claim must cite a chunk with credibility >= 3. Guidelines & systematic reviews (credibility 5) are preferred over primary studies. Average corpus credibility per run must be >= 3.
description: Example workspace (dental & oral health). Writes in English, then transcreates to Indonesian. Content type: health articles for the public, strictly grounded in curated dental journals. Swap in your own domain and sources to make it yours.

name: IT in Education
credibility_policy: Every claim must cite a chunk with credibility >= 3. Peer-reviewed education research, systematic reviews, and official standards/guidelines (credibility 5) are preferred over vendor material and blogs. Average corpus credibility per run must be >= 3.
description: Second FACTOR workspace, proving the topic-agnostic, multi-workspace design. Covers information technology in education (e-learning, LMS, gamification, AI in education, digital literacy, assessment, accessibility). Writes in English, then transcreates to Indonesian, strictly grounded in education research.
